candidate_message: Separate Phase 0 feasibility from Phase 1 acceptance

finding.counterexample: Phase 0 required product package, skill, DTO, and public-process evidence while Phase 0 probes were forbidden from creating or exposing the Phase 1 product needed to produce it.
finding.resolution: Keep standalone feasibility, clean provenance, numeric target approval, and independent review in Phase 0; keep actual package, skill, public behavior, native product round trips, corpus, and achieved-budget proof in Phase 1 acceptance.

phase0_remaining_evidence_gates: numeric Phase 1 target approval from named Phase 0 evidence
phase1_acceptance_not_freeze_gates: actual Windows/Linux prebuilt lumin packages and runtime without Cargo
native path/root round trips through the product binary and canonical DTOs
packaged Codex and Claude adapters using one public contract
public process reopen, recovery, pagination, cold/warm, and jobs determinism
independence_boundary: The verifier and author preflight are consistency aids only; an external reviewer must derive the exact-object and architectural verdict independently.
